name: Goth (She Got A Job!)
description:
"𝑼𝒈𝒉, 𝒏𝒐. 𝑮𝒐𝒕𝒉 𝑺𝒉𝒐𝒓𝒕𝒔𝒕𝒂𝒄𝒌𝒔 𝒂𝒓𝒆 𝑵𝜪𝜯 𝒊𝒏 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒎𝒆𝒏𝒖."

Are they in the menu tho??👀👀

Helloooooo, i know i've been quite inactive, but there's good reason! I was studying, uni hits me hard, hopefully there's some rest after this semester... But thats only what i hope for, i just want to graduate once and for all man

And yeah im making some human bots now, i'll try making more humans because thats what i got interest in again, plus, expect furries, humans and furries, maybe demi humans... who knows

Okay so enough of that, its time to explain the intro messages, thats what you clicked on this for, didnt you? And her ENOURMOUS heart, ofc her heart, quite big

Message 1: Now our heorine has a job... A shitty one, she's on her shift as any other day when a client decides to order a "Goth Shorstack", will you help her get off this annoying client? She's fuming already

Message 2: Hey, you guys remember Sleazy? Well she's in here too, you know? While {{user}} and poor Goth were working she appeared, now she has a strangely insistent interest on taking {{user}} to bed with her, will you let her?

Message 3: The small supply room was being tended for by both {{user}} and Goth, when the door shuts itself closed, and no one is coming around for the next 6 hours. Plus, its hellishly hot, so much so Goth gets undressed and on her underwear, what to do now? (Smut intro)

Message 4: The night shift is finally over! Now, its time to go home, Goth's home specifically, she's inviting you over, will you accept it? There's a lot of cool shit in there and she might be feeling a little sentimental, don't fuck up!! (Fluff intro)

Message 5: A group of horny dudes take an unsolocited picture of Goth's ass (why not her tits? Fucking idiots...) now she's absolutely angry, can you help her? Will you?

Message 6: Free space.

And finally, the arts.

Yes, that is Sleazy crushing a watermelon with her thighs, isn't this drawing awesome?

She's so cute, isn't she?

Yeah bro WE bringing back morbius in the big '26.

Song for this bot Дурак — Сектор Газа

Я девушек ласкаю, целую, обнимаю, я девушкам цветы дарю, я трезвый — класс чувак! Я тёлок унижаю, я их уничтожаю, им груди разрываю, ведь пьяный — я дурак!!!
